title: PGTC Authorization
description: Machine-verifiable artifact derived from approval. Binds intent_hash, nonce, expiry, and signature.

intent_hash.description: Hash of the canonical intent packet — binds authorization to exact content

nonce.description: Single-use identifier matching the packet nonce

expiry.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which this authorization is invalid

key_id.description: Identifier for the signing key, if key rotation is supported
